mapper.select: SELECT session_id AS sessionId, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MAX(create_time)) * 1000 AS timestamp, COUNT(*) AS messageCount, MAX(model) AS model, MAX(question) AS lastMessage FROM sys_ai_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY MAX(create_time) DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) FROM sys_ai_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_ai_conversation WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_ai_conversation WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'SUCCESS' AND create_date = #{today}
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(response_time), 0) FROM sys_ai_conversation WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM sys_ai_conversation WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'SUCCESS' AND create_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} - 1 DAY), '%Y%m%d')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(create_date, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_ai_conversation WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'SUCCESS' AND create_date >= #{startDate} GROUP BY create_date ORDER BY create_date ASC

SELECT question, COUNT(*) AS count, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MAX(create_time)) * 1000 AS lastAskedTime FROM sys_ai_conversation WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'SUCCESS' AND question IS NOT NULL AND question != '' GROUP BY question ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM sys_ai_conversation WHERE is_deleted = 0

SELECT c.user_id AS userId, COUNT(*) AS conversationCount, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MAX(c.create_time)) * 1000 AS lastActiveTime, COALESCE(su.nick_name, au.nick_name) AS username FROM sys_ai_conversation c LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON c.user_id = su.id AND c.user_from = 'sys' LEFT JOIN app_user au ON c.user_id = au.id AND c.user_from = 'app' WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY c.user_id, su.nick_name, au.nick_name ORDER BY conversationCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_ai_conversation WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT user_id FROM sys_ai_conversation WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, session_id, user_id, user_from, question, answer, images, model, sources, temperature, response_time, status, error_msg, create_date, create_time FROM sys_ai_conversation WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
